Bhagwan Parshuram Institute of Technology
Delhi, India
B.Tech in Information Technology; CGPA: 9.02
July 2023 – June 2027
Work Experience
•
Mappls (Certificates)
Remote
AI Intern
June 2025 – September 2025
– Built an Indian Address Parser converting unstructured data into structured JSON (house no., locality, city, state,
PIN), processing 10K+ addresses.
– Designed a rule-based parsing engine using regex, heuristics, and tokenization for noisy address formats.
– Integrated NER enhancements (spaCy + RAG pipelines), improving parsing accuracy to ∼90%.
– Preprocessed and validated data using external datasets, reducing errors by ∼85% and improving reliability.
•
Eterna Infotech Pvt. Ltd. (LOR & Certificates)
Remote
Software Developer Intern
Nov 2024 – Feb 2025
– Developed the front-end of the MTS LMS (10K+ users), building scalable and user-friendly interfaces.
– Implemented gamification features (badges, progress tracking, rewards) to improve engagement and retention.
– Built a responsive dashboard across devices, improving user efficiency by 25%.
– Resolved production bugs and optimized performance, boosting stability and user interaction by 35%.
Achievements
• Grand Finalist – Smart India Hackathon (SIH) 2025, Top 5 out of 68,000+ teams nationwide.
• Winner – IIT Delhi Mappls Hackathon (Tryst 2025), among 720+ teams; also won 5+ national-level hackathons.
• Competitive Programming – Solved 350+ DSA problems across LeetCode and achieved 2 Star rating (Max:
1440, top 30%) on CodeChef.
• Content Creation – Published 10+ DSA videos on YouTube (CodeWithAP), explaining optimized LeetCode
solutions.
Projects
• INDIAN ADDRESS PARSER | Python,FastAPI, spaCy, Regex, REST API, Pandas | Code
– Developed a Python-based address parsing system to convert unstructured Indian addresses into structured JSON
fields using regex and NLP (spaCy), handling 10K+ real-world inputs.
– Designed a PIN-code anchored parsing pipeline using a 155K+ dataset to infer city, district, and state, improving
data completeness and accuracy.
– Implemented advanced preprocessing (abbreviation expansion, noise removal, fuzzy matching) to handle inconsistent
address formats.
– Built a scalable FastAPI backend with bulk parsing (500 requests) and confidence scoring, achieving ∼90%
accuracy and improving efficiency by ∼85%.
• TRACKFLOW | React, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ, bcrypt, Docker | Code
– Streamlined job application workflows by building a full-stack platform using React, Node.js, and MongoDB,
reducing candidate management overhead and increasing application speed by 25%.
– Containerized 4 microservices using Docker & Docker Compose to ensure 100% environment parity, eliminating
deployment configuration errors and environment drift.
– Reduced database load by 60% using Redis caching, ensured high availability, and improved API response time
by 10% by offloading tasks to RabbitMQ-based asynchronous workers.
Technical Skills
Programming Languages: C++, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, SQL
Frameworks & Technologies: React.js, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, REST APIs, WebSockets,
Tailwind CSS
Databases & Tools: MongoDB, MySQL, Git & GitHub, Docker (Foundational), AWS (Foundational), Postman, Vercel
Core CS & AI: Data Structures & Algorithms, System Design, DBMS, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, OOP,
LangChain, RAG Pipelines, LLMs, Transformers
Volunteer Experience
• Project Chair – Drishti (Rotaract Club of BPIT): Led Project Shakti, organizing menstrual hygiene awareness
drives and pad distribution initiatives across underserved communities.
